title: USDA Reports Corn Stocks Up 50 Percent, Soybean Stocks Down 35 Percent from 2013
summary: According to the Grain Stocks report released today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS), there were 1.24 billion bushels of old crop corn in all positions as of September 1, up 50 percent from the same time last year.
